settings.heading: Win a Tickets to Coachella to see Justin Bieber and Sabrina Carpenter!
settings.content:
We’re sending one lucky winner (and their bestie!) to Coachella 2026! 🎉

Catch some of your favourite performers live — including headliners Justin Bieber and Sabrina Carpenter — for a once-in-a-lifetime festival experience.

🌟 Prize Package Includes:
 🎟️ 2 General Admission Tickets to Coachella 2026 (valued at $1,300+ USD) on [April 10, 2026]
🩵 $500 worth of Blume goodies for you and your friend to enjoy

Entering is easy! Simply submit your email below for a chance to win this unforgettable weekend of music, sun, and memories.
settings.terms: Terms and conditions apply. See here for details. Contest ends February 1, 2026.

settings.heading: Place an Order
settings.text: Get 10 extra entries: With all orders placed over $50 US, on Blume.com you will receive 10 extra entries. Use code COACHELLA for 15% off!

settings.heading: Social Media
settings.text: Ensure you follow @Blume on Instagram and Tiktok for more ways to win and important announcements.

settings.heading: Email
settings.text: Share the contest via email or social media and you (and your bestie) will both be awarded entries
settings.email_text: I just entered an Era's Tour Giveaway and you should too! It's hosted by Blume (link blume.com) and you can enter here: https://www.blume.com/pages/product-waitlist

settings.text:
The Blume x Coachella Giveaway: The Fine Print

  • No purchase is necessary. Open to legal-age Canadian and U.S. residents only (including Quebec). One (1) prize will be awarded. Prize includes two (2) General Admission tickets to Coachella on [DATES HERE] at the Empire Polo Club in Indio, California. Travel and lodging costs are not included.
  • Prize redemption is conditional on correctly answering a skill-testing question. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. Contest hosted by Blume, based in Vancouver, Canada.
  • Contest closes at 11:59 PM PST on February 1, 2026. Winner will be notified on [DATE HERE] via email from Blume. Winner must respond within two (2) business days. An alternate winner will be selected if the original winner does not respond or is unable to correctly answer the skill-testing question.
  • This contest is not open to employees, immediate family members of employees, or persons living in the same household as an employee of Blume.
  • This contest is not endorsed by Coachella, any associated event planning company, or record labels.
  • Due to circumstances around COVID-19, events may be subject to change. Venues and event organizers may implement safety requirements, which entrants must accept and comply with in order to attend. Blume assumes no liability for denied entry for any reason, or for the cancellation, postponement, or rescheduling of an event. Ticket holders assume full liability for any risks incurred before, during, and after the event. Please check with the venue, event organizer, or ticket provider for updated information prior to attending.
  • Entries may be refused or rejected if:

  • You attempt to enter the contest in an unauthorized fashion;
  • You are unable to attend the festival. Proof of travel may be requested;
  • Your entry contains false or misleading information, or is late, falsified, illegible, damaged, incomplete, or otherwise irregular;
  • Your entry is submitted using robotic, automated, programmed, or other illicit means; or
  • Your entry is not in compliance with these General Contest Rules.

  • Blume reserves the right to refuse any entry for any other reason it deems necessary.

Tickets are not available for resale under any circumstances.
